subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-23
subcodes.first_line: It will progress to such a degree that anyone can travel with them. The danger will become less and less... Had it not been for steamers, America would not have entered the war.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @universal peace; world unity
